summary: Trading terminal hardening and layout upgrades with a simpler, more resilient terminal workflow.
release_notes: Added a new daily Summary view in the Trading Terminal alongside Positions for faster intraday review.
Expanded the Trading Terminal with draggable split handles and improved responsive sizing across Positions, Summary, Orders, and Hotkeys.
Persisted the new terminal layout sizing in local settings so the terminal restores more reliably after refresh and restart.
Improved table and column behavior across terminal sections for cleaner resizing, scrolling, and column-specific layout control.
Hardened refresh, restore, and live-update behavior across the Trading Terminal to reduce layout shifts and inconsistent state.
Improved Auto-Exit reliability so trigger handling and live position reconciliation behave more consistently under real-time updates.
Reduced Level 2 depth subscriptions to the active Trading Terminal symbol so IB depth limits are less likely to block live L2 data.
